purpose: PDF 2.0 renderer-first conformance matrix. Rows are traceable to ISO 32000-2 clauses/tables by identifier and short paraphrase only.

sources.title: ISO 32000-2:2020 with EC3, PDF Association sponsored local copy
sources.policy: Do not commit the ISO PDF or long copied text; store identifiers, headings, names, and paraphrases only.

sources.title: PDF Association cheat sheets and application notes
sources.role: Secondary references for classification and coverage planning.

sourceMatrices.role: Existing image/filter obligations remain part of renderer conformance evidence.

profiles.RendererCore: Hard gate for rendering behavior pdfe claims now.
profiles.ParserSupport: Hard gate only where parsing is required for rendering.
profiles.PreserveOnly: Valid structures that must not be destroyed but are not rendered yet.
profiles.SecurityPolicy: Hard gate for hostile inputs and resource limits that affect rendering.
profiles.TaggedPdf: Tracked, non-blocking structure and accessibility behavior.
profiles.Multimedia3D: Tracked, non-blocking rich media and 3D behavior.

coveragePolicy.referenceDisagreementPolicy: Choose target Poppler, MuPDF, PDFium, Ghostscript, PDFBox, consensus, or spec judgment per PDF/page; low-impact oracle disagreement is not automatically a pdfe bug.

requirements.obligation: Parse direct and indirect objects needed to resolve pages, resources, streams, and content operands.
requirements.notes: Renderer hard gate because page rendering depends on object resolution.

requirements.obligation: Decode streams and filter arrays used by page content and resources.
requirements.notes: Detailed filter obligations are represented by the image/filter source matrix.

requirements.obligation: Resolve page tree inheritance for boxes, rotation, resources, and contents before rendering.
requirements.notes: Known page-box disagreements should be classified in contracts.

requirements.obligation: Apply media, crop, bleed, trim, and art box selection according to the active render contract.
requirements.notes: Policy-sensitive; corpus contracts must state the target page box.

requirements.obligation: Apply ExtGState dictionaries that affect visible rendering, including alpha, blend mode, line settings, and soft masks.
requirements.notes: Hostile or unsupported values must be explicit no-op/warn/refusal decisions.

requirements.obligation: Resolve color spaces and color-setting operators for visible fills, strokes, images, patterns, and shadings.
requirements.notes: Color-management disagreements should be classified rather than treated as automatic defects.

requirements.obligation: Render tiling and shading patterns with correct resource lookup, phase, matrix, and paint type behavior.
requirements.notes: Includes known tiling pattern fidelity work.

requirements.obligation: Render image XObjects and inline images with masks, decode arrays, interpolation, color spaces, and filters.
Render Form XObjects with their own resources, matrix, bounding box, transparency group, and nested content.
requirements.notes: Recursion limits are covered separately by security policy.

requirements.obligation: Resolve fonts, encodings, CMaps, glyph metrics, and text rendering modes needed for visual text output.
requirements.notes: Text extraction and visual glyph placement evidence both count.

requirements.obligation: Composite transparency groups, blend modes, alpha constants, and soft masks in rendering order.
requirements.notes: Reference disagreement policy applies to minor colorimetric variance.

requirements.obligation: Apply optional content default visibility when rendering page content.
requirements.notes: Interactive layer switching is tracked separately as non-blocking.

requirements.obligation: Bound decompression, malformed streams, and repeated filter work so rendering fails deterministically instead of hanging or exhausting memory.
requirements.notes: Failures must classify as refusal or warning, not unclassified renderer defects.

requirements.obligation: Bound huge image dimensions, masks, and decode buffers during rendering.
Detect recursive or cyclic XObject/resource references before stack overflow or unbounded work.
requirements.notes: ContentStreamCycleType3insideType3 and related corpus evidence should remain classified.

requirements.obligation: Track annotation appearance and interaction coverage separately from renderer hard gate unless appearance rendering is claimed.
requirements.notes: Appearance rendering can graduate individual rows to RendererCore later.

requirements.obligation: Track logical structure and marked-content semantics without blocking renderer conformance.
requirements.notes: Marked content operators are renderer no-ops except for optional content/resource effects.

requirements.obligation: Track signature dictionaries, byte ranges, and validation policy outside the renderer gate.
requirements.notes: Existing signature tests are product coverage, not renderer conformance.

requirements.obligation: Track multimedia, rich media, and 3D annotations as unsupported or preserve-only until claimed.
Track geospatial dictionaries and measure properties without blocking page rendering.
